Address: 957 Hayes Street, 957 Hayes St APT 9, San Francisco, CA 94117
Description (Premium Data): Experience timeless San Francisco living at 957 Hayes Apartments, where historic charm meets modern functionality in the heart of Alamo Square. This pet-friendly, smoke-free residence provides a secure and comfortable environment with gated entry, intercom access, and a thoughtfully maintained shared backyarda rare urban retreat. Residents enjoy seamless online rent payments, dedicated maintenance and support services, and a sustainability-focused waste management system. Inside, each residence features expansive windows that flood the interiors with natural light, spacious layouts designed for effortless living, and kitchens that balance efficiency with ample counter space. Just steps from Alamo Square Park's breathtaking city views, renowned eateries like Brenda's Meat & Three, and Japantown's cultural landmarks, this residence offers unparalleled convenience. Nearby public transit provides direct access to the Financial District, SoMa's thriving tech scene, and Hayes Valley's boutique-lined streets, making it the perfect choice for professionals and urban explorers alike. Discover the lifestyle you've been looking for at 957 Hayes Apartments.

Beautifully appointed single-family home in a desirable Noe Valley location. The main level features a well-equipped kitchen with garbage disposal, Whirlpool refrigerator, and dishwasher. The kitchen opens to a spacious dining and living area with box-beam ceilings and French doors leading to a rear deck with direct access to a landscaped backyard and hot tub.

The main level also includes two large bedrooms, a full bathroom, and a separate office. The lower level offers an oversized primary suite with a large full bathroom, walk-in closet, sitting area, and a second set of French doors opening to the backyard.

Additional features include abundant storage, interior garage access, EV charging, in-unit laundry, and a large unfinished attic.

Amenities:

* Garage with interior access and EV charging
* In-unit washer and dryer, both less than one year old
* Bonus room / separate office
* Large attic storage
* Walk-in closet
* Private patio and landscaped backyard
* Hot tub

Location:

* Close to public transit, including the 24 bus and J Church
* Approximately 2 minutes from I-280
* Two flat blocks from the Noe Valley Recreation Center including playgrounds, tennis courts, basketball courts, and gymnasium
* 10-minute walk to 24th Street, including Whole Foods, the Noe Valley Farmers Market, shops, and restaurants
* Easy street parking

Tenant pays all utilities
12+ month lease terms available
Unfurnished
Non-smoking rental
Pets considered on a case by case basisShow more

* Oversized garage with room for parking, storage, and a bonus room - ideal for a workshop, home gym, or creative studio
* Generously sized backyard offers a blank canvas for outdoor living

PEACEFUL, CENTRAL LOCATION IN MIDTOWN TERRACE
* Quiet residential neighborhood tucked in the hills of San Francisco
* Short walk to Twin Peaks Park with access to panoramic Bay Area views and scenic hiking trails
* Convenient access to public transit and commuter routes

Address: 1350 Natoma St APT 4, San Francisco, CA 94103
Description (Premium Data):
Come live in this modern 2BR/2BA with garage parking and a private spacious patio in the sunny Mission District! This apartment comes unfurnished (photos are staged). 

Amenities: Garage parking (no additional cost), private spacious patio, in-unit washer dryer, hardwood floors, walk-in closet, modern kitchen, and a storage unit in the garage.

Location: Centrally located to many restaurants, bars, and grocery stores. The apartment is also located on a side street that does not get a lot of foot traffic (quieter at night). 

Transportation: Easy access to 101/280/80 for commuting out of the city or for a weekend excursion and a 5 min walk to the 16th and Bart Station to commute downtown.

Utilities: Water and trash included in rent. Gas, Electric, and Internet/Cable paid for by tenant.

Lease: 1 year min then month to month. 1st month's rent and security deposit due at signing. Open to discussing longer terms if interested.Show more
